description: Microsoft denies Copilot is only for entertainment purpose, after its own document says do not trust AI  Windows LatestMicrosoft says Copilot is for entertainment purposes only, not serious use — firm pushing AI hard to consumers and businesses tells users not to rely on it for important advice  Tom's HardwareEven AI Companies Know Their Models Can’t Be Trusted  MediumCopilot is ‘for entertainment purposes only,’ according to Microsoft’s terms of use  TechCrunchCopilot Terms Claim Microsoft's AI Is for 'Entertainment Purposes Only'  PCMag
